product_name: Thales CipherTrust Data Security Platform (Note: Document primarily references "Luna HSMs", "High Speed Encryptors", "MultiApp v5.2 Premium PQC", and "Thales Cybersecurity and Digital Identity" portfolio)
product_brief: A comprehensive security infrastructure platform providing quantum-safe key management, PKI, data protection, and identity credentials via HSMs and secure elements.
pqc_support: Yes (with details: NIST-standardized ML-KEM, ML-DSA, LMS/HSS, and Falcon/FN-DSA integrated in firmware; hybrid modes supported)
pqc_capability_description: Thales integrates PQC algorithms (ML-KEM, ML-DSA, LMS/HSS, Falcon) directly into Luna HSM firmware and High Speed Encryptors. Supports hybrid PQC/classical protection for data-in-motion (Layers 2–4), PKI, TLS, code signing, and key management. Includes crypto-agility to shift between classical and PQC algorithms. MultiApp v5.2 Premium PQC is CC EAL6+ certified.
pqc_migration_priority: Critical (Document states "urgent to plan and execute" by 2030/2035; addresses "Harvest Now, Decrypt Later" threats for critical systems)
crypto_primitives: ML-KEM, ML-DSA, LMS/HSS, Falcon (FN-DSA), classical public key algorithms (specific names like ECDSA/RSA not explicitly listed in text, but "classical" is mentioned)
key_management_model: HSM-backed (Luna HSMs), secure element-based (eSE), hybrid modes, crypto-agile architectures supporting quantum-safe and classical keys
architecture_type: Hardware Security Module (HSM)-based, FPGA-based (for High Speed Encryptors), Secure Element (eSE) based, hybrid PQC/classical
license: Proprietary (Not explicitly stated as Open Source; described as commercial solutions and products)
latest_version: MultiApp v5.2 Premium PQC; Java Card standard release v3.3 (planned for 2026)
fips_validated: Yes (Luna HSMs are FIPS 140-3 Level 3 platforms; Falcon is FIPS 206)
primary_platforms: Production-proven systems, mobile networks (5G), cloud infrastructures, embedded environments (IoT, automotive), secure elements (eSIM, ePassports)
target_industries: Finance (Wells Fargo, HSBC), Telecom (SK Telecom, GSMA), Government/Defense (Canada's DIGITAL/NDEC), Identity/Travel (ICAO), Enterprise
regulatory_status: ANSSI-certified at CC EAL6+ (MultiApp v5.2); FIPS 140-3 Level 3 (Luna HSMs); FIPS 206 (Falcon)
pqc_roadmap_details: Transition to PQC by 2030 for critical systems and 2035 for broader infrastructures; Java Card standard v3.3 with formal PQC support planned for 2026; ongoing participation in NIST, OASIS, GlobalPlatform, ISO, ETSI, GSMA, 3GPP, ICAO, FIDO Alliance
